chapter_title.en: Chapter 138 – The mistakes during the two Cycles (of Salaat) of the Tawaaf

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/56)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/56)
text: ا طُفْنَا بِالْبَيْتِ طَوَافَ النِّسَاءِ وَ نَسِينَا الرَّكْعَتَيْنِ فَلَمَّا صِرْنَا بِمِنًى ذَكَرْنَاهُمَا فَأَتَيْنَا أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) فَسَأَلْنَاهُ فَقَالَ صَلِّيَاهُمَا بِمِنًى .

en.hubeali: Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Al Husayn Za’lan, from Al Husayn Bin Bashaar, from Hisham Bin Al Musna, and Hanaan, both said,

‘We performed Tawaaf by the House (Kaaba), the Tawaaf of the women (طَوَافَ النِّسَاءِ), and we forgot the two Cycles (to be Prayed). So when we went to Mina, we remembered these. So we went over to Abu Abdullahasws and asked himasws. So heasws said: ‘Pray these at Mina’.
en.sarwar: 8. Ahmad ibn Muhammad has narrated from Muhammad ibn al-Husayn al-Za’lan from al-Husayn ibn Bashshar from Hisham ibn al- Muthanna’ and Hanan who have said the following: “We performed Tawaf al-Nisa’ around the House but forgot the two Rak‘at Salat (prayer). When we arrived in Mina’, we remembered the two Rak‘at Salat (prayer). We then went to abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, and asked him about it. He (the Imam) said, ‘You must perform them in Mina’.’”
